label: F280 Total Building Design Heat Loss

_meta.description: Total building design heat loss at heating design conditions per CSA F280-12 Section 5.2.7. This is the PRIMARY F280 output value used for heating equipment sizing. It is the sum of peak envelope transmission losses, peak infiltration losses, and peak ventilation losses (net of HRV/ERV recovery). The installed heating capacity must be >= 100% of this value.
_meta.formPage: F280 Form Page 3 - Total Building Heat Loss

inputs.name: f280.peakEnvelopeHeatLoss
inputs.description: Peak envelope transmission heat loss at design conditions

inputs.name: f280.peakInfiltrationHeatLoss
inputs.description: Peak infiltration heat loss at design conditions

inputs.name: f280.peakVentilationHeatLoss
inputs.description: Peak ventilation heat loss (net of recovery) at design conditions

output.note: Total peak building heat loss - the F280 design heat loss value

invariants.description: Total design heat loss cannot be negative

behavior.condition: All three peak loss components available
behavior.note: Simple sum of all peak heat loss components at design conditions

where.Q_env: Peak envelope heat loss (W) from f280.peakEnvelopeHeatLoss
where.Q_inf: Peak infiltration heat loss (W) from f280.peakInfiltrationHeatLoss
where.Q_vent: Peak ventilation heat loss net of recovery (W) from f280.peakVentilationHeatLoss

formula.btu_conversion: Q_total_BTU = Q_total × 3.412 (to convert W to BTU/h)

references.source: CSA F280-12 Section 5.2.7 - Total Building Heat Loss
F280 Form Page 3 - Total Building Heat Loss field
